scripts.build:wasm: cd src-tauri && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=nightly cargo build --lib --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -Z build-std=panic_abort,std --release && command -v wasm-bindgen >/dev/null || cargo install wasm-bindgen-cli@0.2.114 --locked && wasm-bindgen ../../../dist/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/isometric_game.wasm --out-dir ../wasm-pkg --target web --out-name isometric_game
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npx tsc && vite build && mkdir -p dist/assets/shaders dist/assets/textures && cp -r public/assets/shaders/*.wgsl dist/assets/shaders/ && cp -r public/assets/textures/* dist/assets/textures/
